untranslatable_reason: Signal requires: (1) Belt Hold candle pattern identification - a multi-candle pattern not reducible to single-bar indicators; (2) Dynamic median calculation of candle height ratio to classify tall vs short candles - requires rolling percentile calculation not available in indicator list; (3) Market regime context (bull/down breakouts vs bear/up breakouts) that cannot be precisely determined from provided regime types. The 'tall candle' vs 'short candle' performance differential requires pattern-level analysis beyond standard OHLCV indicators.
translation_notes: Attempted entry using range > ATR as proxy for 'tall candle' detection, and context-dependent direction with exits based on moving average crossovers within the 5-10 day window mentioned in source text. However, the core Belt Hold pattern recognition and performance variance mechanism cannot be accurately expressed using only the allowed indicators. A proper implementation would require custom pattern recognition logic.
